original: Why pay for backup dancers when these VI-piloted holograms can accentuate your every move? Whether classy or klutzy, your dances will be perfectly harmonized by the motions of a half-dozen of Dhaal’s best beauties - now with support for the exotic and oh-so brutish alien ‘males’ as well. New models added daily! Don’t get lost in the crowd - own it! Heaven is found in Utopian Skies! (Bonus: Provides an additional “Really Likes” multiplier to tease attacks and damage.)
